sn.s: Ich mues bim Coiffeur aalüte für e Termin.
sn.e: I have to call the hairdresser for an appointment.

sn.s: Am Telefon isch alls schwiriger, mer gseht nüt.
sn.e: On the phone everything is harder, you can't see anything.

sn.s: Sie redt schnäll, ich verstah nöd alls.
sn.e: She speaks fast, I don't understand everything.

sn.s: "Chönd Sie das no einisch säge, bitte?"
sn.e: "Could you say that once more, please?"

sn.s: "Am Mittwuch am zwöi passt mer guet."
sn.e: "Wednesday at two works well for me."
"Tom. T-O-M." I spell it out to be sure.

sn.s: Das isch e grossi Hürde gsi, und ich han's packt.
sn.e: That was a big hurdle, and I managed it.
